turns.query: Analyze the collective pollution transport from Handan steel enterprise cluster to air quality station: Youth Activity Center (station_id: 269) during 2025-06-10 08:00:00 to 2025-06-10 18:00:00.
turns.actual_response:
核验结果确认：站点269为“青少年活动中心”，统计窗口为2025-06-10 08:00:00至18:00:00，按起始时刻包含、结束时刻不包含计算，共10个小时记录。

VERIFY mean_pm25: stored=11.8 | independent=11.8 | final=11.8  
VERIFY max_pm25: stored=18.0 | independent=18.0 | final=18.0  
VERIFY mean_aqi: stored=30.8 | independent=30.8 | final=30.8  
VERIFY exceedance_hours: stored=0 | independent=0 | final=0  
VERIFY peak_pm25_hour_of_day: stored=16 | independent=16 | final=16  

最终变量结果：
- mean_pm25 = 11.8
- max_pm25 = 18.0
- mean_aqi = 30.8
- exceedance_hours = 0
- peak_pm25_hour_of_day = 16

污染传输分析结论：  
在该时段内，青少年活动中心站PM2.5平均浓度为11.8，最高值为18.0，AQI均值为30.8，整体污染水平较低；PM2.5未出现超过75的小时，超标小时数为0。PM2.5峰值出现在16时，但峰值浓度仍处于较低水平。

邯郸钢铁企业集群共有28家钢铁企业纳入空间分析，其中19家在该时段存在小时排放记录。该集群距青少年活动中心站较远，最近约471.31公里，平均约495.97公里，最远约535.90公里。该时段钢铁企业集群总排放量为：颗粒物3435.29千克、氮氧化物11834.72千克、二氧化硫5892.85千克、一氧化碳742700.42千克。

风场匹配结果显示，站点周边平均风速约2.60米/秒，与“邯郸钢铁企业集群至青少年活动中心站”方向相匹配的排放记录占比约10%。按风向匹配条件估算，对应风向一致时段的颗粒物排放量为336.62千克、氮氧化物1126.79千克、二氧化硫528.20千克、一氧化碳69008.23千克。

综合判断：该时段邯郸钢铁企业集群虽存在较大排放，但其与青少年活动中心站距离接近500公里，且风向匹配比例仅约10%；同时站点PM2.5与AQI均维持低值、无PM2.5超标小时。因此，基于现有小时观测和风场数据，本时段未显示邯郸钢铁企业集群对青少年活动中心站形成显著集体污染输送影响。
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 显式给定站点ID，按要求直接使用，不按名称重新解析
station_id_youth_activity_center = 269
station269_window_start = "2025-06-10 08:00:00"
station269_window_end_exclusive = "2025-06-10 18:00:00"
print(f"RESOLVED: Youth Activity Center = {station_id_youth_activity_center}")

# 核验站点ID是否存在
station269_meta_count_df = pd.read_sql(
    text("""
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
        FROM air_quality_station
        WHERE id = :station_id
    """),
    engine,
    params={"station_id": station_id_youth_activity_center}
)
station269_meta_count = int(station269_meta_count_df.loc[0, "n"])
print(f"station269_meta_count row count: {len(station269_meta_count_df)}; matched stations: {station269_meta_count}")

if station269_meta_count == 0:
    print("UNRESOLVED: Youth Activity Center")
    station269_hourly_pm25_aqi_df = pd.DataFrame(columns=["timestamp", "pm2_5", "aqi"])
    print("station269_hourly_pm25_aqi_df row count: 0; expected station id was not found")
else:
    # 大表查询前先按过滤条件计数
    station269_hourly_obs_count_df = pd.read_sql(
        text("""
            SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
            FROM hourly_station_air_quality
            WHERE station_id = :station_id
              AND timestamp >= :start_ts
              AND timestamp < :end_ts
        """),
        engine,
        params={
            "station_id": station_id_youth_activity_center,
            "start_ts": station269_window_start,
            "end_ts": station269_window_end_exclusive
        }
    )
    station269_hourly_obs_count = int(station269_hourly_obs_count_df.loc[0, "n"])
    print(f"station269_hourly_obs_count_df row count: {len(station269_hourly_obs_count_df)}; matched observations: {station269_hourly_obs_count}")

    if station269_hourly_obs_count == 0:
        # 空结果时复核同一站点在当天是否有数据，避免静默传递空结果
        station269_same_day_count_df = pd.read_sql(
            text("""
                SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
                FROM hourly_station_air_quality
                WHERE station_id = :station_id
                  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-10 00:00:00'
                  AND timestamp < '2025-06-11 00:00:00'
            """),
            engine,
            params={"station_id": station_id_youth_activity_center}
        )
        station269_same_day_count = int(station269_same_day_count_df.loc[0, "n"])
        print(f"station269_same_day_count_df row count: {len(station269_same_day_count_df)}; same-day observations: {station269_same_day_count}")
        station269_hourly_pm25_aqi_df = pd.DataFrame(columns=["timestamp", "pm2_5", "aqi"])
        print("station269_hourly_pm25_aqi_df row count: 0; queried time window has no observations after ID/filter re-check")
    else:
        station269_hourly_pm25_aqi_df = pd.read_sql(
            text("""
                SELECT timestamp, pm2_5, aqi
                FROM hourly_station_air_quality
                WHERE station_id = :station_id
                  AND timestamp >= :start_ts
                  AND timestamp < :end_ts
                ORDER BY timestamp
            """),
            engine,
            params={
                "station_id": station_id_youth_activity_center,
                "start_ts": station269_window_start,
                "end_ts": station269_window_end_exclusive
            }
        )
        print(f"station269_hourly_pm25_aqi_df row count: {len(station269_hourly_pm25_aqi_df)}")

        # 为后续综合代理暂存所需统计量，不占用最终输出变量名
        station269_pm25_aqi_summary_for_synthesis = {
            "mean_pm25_candidate": float(station269_hourly_pm25_aqi_df["pm2_5"].mean()) if station269_hourly_pm25_aqi_df["pm2_5"].notna().any() else None,
            "max_pm25_candidate": float(station269_hourly_pm25_aqi_df["pm2_5"].max()) if station269_hourly_pm25_aqi_df["pm2_5"].notna().any() else None,
            "mean_aqi_candidate": float(station269_hourly_pm25_aqi_df["aqi"].mean()) if station269_hourly_pm25_aqi_df["aqi"].notna().any() else None,
            "exceedance_hours_pm25_gt_75_candidate": int((station269_hourly_pm25_aqi_df["pm2_5"] > 75).sum()),
            "peak_pm25_hour_of_day_candidate": int(station269_hourly_pm25_aqi_df.loc[station269_hourly_pm25_aqi_df["pm2_5"].idxmax(), "timestamp"].hour) if station269_hourly_pm25_aqi_df["pm2_5"].notna().any() else None
        }
        print(
            "station269_pm25_aqi_summary_for_synthesis: "
            f"valid_pm25={int(station269_hourly_pm25_aqi_df['pm2_5'].notna().sum())}, "
            f"valid_aqi={int(station269_hourly_pm25_aqi_df['aqi'].notna().sum())}, "
            f"mean_pm25_candidate={station269_pm25_aqi_summary_for_synthesis['mean_pm25_candidate']}, "
            f"max_pm25_candidate={station269_pm25_aqi_summary_for_synthesis['max_pm25_candidate']}, "
            f"mean_aqi_candidate={station269_pm25_aqi_summary_for_synthesis['mean_aqi_candidate']}, "
            f"exceedance_hours_pm25_gt_75_candidate={station269_pm25_aqi_summary_for_synthesis['exceedance_hours_pm25_gt_75_candidate']}, "
            f"peak_pm25_hour_of_day_candidate={station269_pm25_aqi_summary_for_synthesis['peak_pm25_hour_of_day_candidate']}"
        )

import pandas as pd

summary = station269_pm25_aqi_summary_for_synthesis

def _get_first(d, keys):
    for k in keys:
        if k in d and pd.notna(d[k]):
            return d[k]
    raise KeyError(f"缺少必要汇总字段，已有字段: {list(d.keys())}")

try:
    mean_pm25 = float(_get_first(summary, ["mean_pm25", "avg_pm25", "pm25_mean", "mean_pm2_5", "avg_pm2_5"]))
    max_pm25 = float(_get_first(summary, ["max_pm25", "pm25_max", "max_pm2_5"]))
    mean_aqi = float(_get_first(summary, ["mean_aqi", "avg_aqi", "aqi_mean"]))
    exceedance_hours = int(_get_first(summary, ["exceedance_hours", "pm25_exceedance_hours", "hours_pm25_gt_75"]))
    peak_pm25_hour_of_day = int(_get_first(summary, ["peak_pm25_hour_of_day", "peak_hour", "pm25_peak_hour_of_day"]))
except KeyError:
    df = station269_hourly_pm25_aqi_df.copy()
    if df.empty:
        raise ValueError("已获取的站点观测数据为空，无法计算所需指标。")
    ts_col = "timestamp" if "timestamp" in df.columns else _get_first({c: c for c in df.columns}, ["time", "datetime"])
    pm_col = "pm2_5" if "pm2_5" in df.columns else ("pm25" if "pm25" in df.columns else "pm2.5")
    aqi_col = "aqi"
    df = df[[ts_col, pm_col, aqi_col]].dropna(subset=[pm_col, aqi_col])
    if df.empty:
        raise ValueError("已获取的站点观测数据缺少有效PM2.5或AQI值，无法计算所需指标。")
    mean_pm25 = float(df[pm_col].mean())
    max_pm25 = float(df[pm_col].max())
    mean_aqi = float(df[aqi_col].mean())
    exceedance_hours = int((df[pm_col] > 75).sum())
    peak_pm25_hour_of_day = int(pd.to_datetime(df.loc[df[pm_col].idxmax(), ts_col]).hour)

if not (0 <= peak_pm25_hour_of_day <= 23):
    raise ValueError("peak_pm25_hour_of_day 不在0-23范围内。")

print("mean_pm25 =", mean_pm25)
print("max_pm25 =", max_pm25)
print("mean_aqi =", mean_aqi)
print("exceedance_hours =", exceedance_hours)
print("peak_pm25_hour_of_day =", peak_pm25_hour_of_day)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 保存旧值用于独立核验对比
old_vals = {
    "mean_pm25": mean_pm25,
    "max_pm25": max_pm25,
    "mean_aqi": mean_aqi,
    "exceedance_hours": exceedance_hours,
    "peak_pm25_hour_of_day": peak_pm25_hour_of_day
}

start_ts = "2025-06-10 08:00:00"
end_ts = "2025-06-10 18:00:00"
station_id = 269

# 1) 独立核验站点身份与窗口内小时记录规模
meta_df = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT s.id, s.name, s.station_type, c.name AS city_name, d.name AS district_name,
       ST_X(s.coordinate::geometry) AS lon, ST_Y(s.coordinate::geometry) AS lat
FROM air_quality_station s
LEFT JOIN city c ON s.city_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN district d ON s.district_id = d.id
WHERE s.id = :station_id
"""), engine, params={"station_id": station_id})

count_df = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS n_obs,
       COUNT(pm2_5)::int AS n_pm25,
       COUNT(aqi)::int AS n_aqi,
       MIN(timestamp) AS first_ts,
       MAX(timestamp) AS last_ts
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = :station_id
  AND timestamp >= :start_ts::timestamp
  AND timestamp <  :end_ts::timestamp
"""), engine, params={"station_id": station_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})

# 2) 独立计算要求输出：均值、峰值、超标小时、峰值所在小时
stats_df = pd.read_sql(text("""
WITH w AS (
    SELECT timestamp, pm2_5, aqi
    FROM hourly_station_air_quality
    WHERE station_id = :station_id
      AND timestamp >= :start_ts::timestamp
      AND timestamp <  :end_ts::timestamp
),
peak AS (
    SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp)::int AS peak_hour
    FROM w
    WHERE pm2_5 IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY pm2_5 DESC, timestamp ASC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT AVG(pm2_5)::float AS mean_pm25,
       MAX(pm2_5)::float AS max_pm25,
       AVG(aqi)::float AS mean_aqi,
       SUM(CASE WHEN pm2_5 > 75 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::int AS exceedance_hours,
       (SELECT peak_hour FROM peak)::int AS peak_pm25_hour_of_day
FROM w
"""), engine, params={"station_id": station_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})

ind = stats_df.iloc[0].to_dict()
mean_pm25 = None if pd.isna(ind["mean_pm25"]) else float(ind["mean_pm25"])
max_pm25 = None if pd.isna(ind["max_pm25"]) else float(ind["max_pm25"])
mean_aqi = None if pd.isna(ind["mean_aqi"]) else float(ind["mean_aqi"])
exceedance_hours = 0 if pd.isna(ind["exceedance_hours"]) else int(ind["exceedance_hours"])
peak_pm25_hour_of_day = None if pd.isna(ind["peak_pm25_hour_of_day"]) else int(ind["peak_pm25_hour_of_day"])

final_vals = {
    "mean_pm25": mean_pm25,
    "max_pm25": max_pm25,
    "mean_aqi": mean_aqi,
    "exceedance_hours": exceedance_hours,
    "peak_pm25_hour_of_day": peak_pm25_hour_of_day
}

# 3) 为污染传输分析做聚合：邯郸钢铁企业集群相对站点空间关系、排放、风场输送匹配
transport_df = pd.read_sql(text("""
WITH st AS (
    SELECT coordinate
    FROM air_quality_station
    WHERE id = :station_id
),
steel AS (
    SELECT pc.id, pc.name, pc.coordinate,
           ST_Distance(pc.coordinate, (SELECT coordinate FROM st)) AS dist_m,
           degrees(ST_Azimuth((SELECT coordinate FROM st)::geometry, pc.coordinate::geometry)) AS bearing_station_to_company_deg
    FROM polluting_company pc
    WHERE pc.city_id = 4
      AND pc.industry_type = 'STEEL'
      AND pc.coordinate IS NOT NULL
),
em AS (
    SELECT company_id,
           SUM(pm)::float AS pm_kg,
           SUM(nox)::float AS nox_kg,
           SUM(so2)::float AS so2_kg,
           SUM(co)::float AS co_kg,
           COUNT(*)::int AS emission_hours
    FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
    WHERE timestamp >= :start_ts::timestamp
      AND timestamp <  :end_ts::timestamp
    GROUP BY company_id
),
steel_em AS (
    SELECT s.*, COALESCE(e.pm_kg,0) AS pm_kg, COALESCE(e.nox_kg,0) AS nox_kg,
           COALESCE(e.so2_kg,0) AS so2_kg, COALESCE(e.co_kg,0) AS co_kg,
           COALESCE(e.emission_hours,0) AS emission_hours
    FROM steel s
    LEFT JOIN em e ON e.company_id = s.id
),
wind AS (
    SELECT timestamp, AVG(wind_speed)::float AS wind_speed,
           degrees(atan2(AVG(sin(radians(wind_degree))), AVG(cos(radians(wind_degree))))) AS wd_raw
    FROM hourly_grid_wind
    WHERE timestamp >= :start_ts::timestamp
      AND timestamp <  :end_ts::timestamp
      AND ST_DWithin(coordinate, (SELECT coordinate FROM st), 10000)
      AND wind_degree IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY timestamp
),
wind2 AS (
    SELECT timestamp, wind_speed,
           CASE WHEN wd_raw < 0 THEN wd_raw + 360 ELSE wd_raw END AS wind_from_deg
    FROM wind
),
pair AS (
    SELECT se.id, se.dist_m, se.bearing_station_to_company_deg, se.pm_kg, se.nox_kg, se.so2_kg, se.co_kg,
           w.timestamp, w.wind_speed, w.wind_from_deg,
           LEAST(ABS(w.wind_from_deg - se.bearing_station_to_company_deg),
                 360 - ABS(w.wind_from_deg - se.bearing_station_to_company_deg)) AS angular_diff_deg
    FROM steel_em se
    CROSS JOIN wind2 w
),
agg AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT id)::int AS steel_company_count,
           MIN(dist_m/1000.0)::float AS min_distance_km,
           AVG(dist_m/1000.0)::float AS mean_distance_km,
           MAX(dist_m/1000.0)::float AS max_distance_km,
           SUM(pm_kg)::float AS total_pm_kg,
           SUM(nox_kg)::float AS total_nox_kg,
           SUM(so2_kg)::float AS total_so2_kg,
           SUM(co_kg)::float AS total_co_kg,
           COUNT(DISTINCT timestamp)::int AS wind_hours,
           AVG(wind_speed)::float AS mean_wind_speed_ms,
           AVG(CASE WHEN angular_diff_deg <= 45 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)::float AS source_to_station_wind_match_share,
           SUM(CASE WHEN angular_diff_deg <= 45 THEN pm_kg ELSE 0 END)::float AS wind_aligned_pm_kg
    FROM pair
)
SELECT * FROM agg
"""), engine, params={"station_id": station_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})

hourly_diag_df = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM h.timestamp)::int AS hour,
       h.pm2_5::float AS pm25,
       h.aqi::float AS aqi
FROM hourly_station_air_quality h
WHERE h.station_id = :station_id
  AND h.timestamp >= :start_ts::timestamp
  AND h.timestamp <  :end_ts::timestamp
ORDER BY h.timestamp
"""), engine, params={"station_id": station_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})

# 4) 打印核验、最终输出和聚合分析结果（不打印原始大表）
print("站点核验:", meta_df.to_dict("records")[0] if len(meta_df) else "未找到站点")
print("时段记录核验:", count_df.to_dict("records")[0])
for k, v in final_vals.items():
    print(f"VERIFY {k}: stored={old_vals[k]} | independent={v} | final={v}")
print("FINAL mean_pm25 =", mean_pm25)
print("FINAL max_pm25 =", max_pm25)
print("FINAL mean_aqi =", mean_aqi)
print("FINAL exceedance_hours =", exceedance_hours)
print("FINAL peak_pm25_hour_of_day =", peak_pm25_hour_of_day)

if len(hourly_diag_df):
    print("小时变化摘要:", {
        "pm25_start": float(hourly_diag_df.iloc[0]["pm25"]) if pd.notna(hourly_diag_df.iloc[0]["pm25"]) else None,
        "pm25_end": float(hourly_diag_df.iloc[-1]["pm25"]) if pd.notna(hourly_diag_df.iloc[-1]["pm25"]) else None,
        "pm25_min": float(hourly_diag_df["pm25"].min()),
        "pm25_max": float(hourly_diag_df["pm25"].max()),
        "aqi_min": float(hourly_diag_df["aqi"].min()),
        "aqi_max": float(hourly_diag_df["aqi"].max())
    })
print("邯郸钢铁企业集群输送聚合摘要:", transport_df.to_dict("records")[0] if len(transport_df) else "无可用聚合结果")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 重新独立核验并修正：2025-06-10 08:00:00（含）至18:00:00（不含），站点269
old_vals = {
    "mean_pm25": mean_pm25,
    "max_pm25": max_pm25,
    "mean_aqi": mean_aqi,
    "exceedance_hours": exceedance_hours,
    "peak_pm25_hour_of_day": peak_pm25_hour_of_day
}
station_id = 269
start_ts = "2025-06-10 08:00:00"
end_ts = "2025-06-10 18:00:00"

meta_df = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT s.id, s.name, s.station_type, c.name AS city_name, d.name AS district_name,
       ST_X(s.coordinate::geometry) AS lon, ST_Y(s.coordinate::geometry) AS lat
FROM air_quality_station s
LEFT JOIN city c ON s.city_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN district d ON s.district_id = d.id
WHERE s.id = :station_id
"""), engine, params={"station_id": station_id})

count_df = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS n_obs,
       COUNT(pm2_5)::int AS n_pm25,
       COUNT(aqi)::int AS n_aqi,
       MIN(timestamp) AS first_ts,
       MAX(timestamp) AS last_ts
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = :station_id
  AND timestamp >= CAST(:start_ts AS timestamp)
  AND timestamp <  CAST(:end_ts AS timestamp)
"""), engine, params={"station_id": station_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})

stats_df = pd.read_sql(text("""
WITH w AS (
    SELECT timestamp, pm2_5, aqi
    FROM hourly_station_air_quality
    WHERE station_id = :station_id
      AND timestamp >= CAST(:start_ts AS timestamp)
      AND timestamp <  CAST(:end_ts AS timestamp)
),
peak AS (
    SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp)::int AS peak_hour
    FROM w
    WHERE pm2_5 IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY pm2_5 DESC, timestamp ASC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT AVG(pm2_5)::float AS mean_pm25,
       MAX(pm2_5)::float AS max_pm25,
       AVG(aqi)::float AS mean_aqi,
       SUM(CASE WHEN pm2_5 > 75 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::int AS exceedance_hours,
       (SELECT peak_hour FROM peak)::int AS peak_pm25_hour_of_day
FROM w
"""), engine, params={"station_id": station_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})

ind = stats_df.iloc[0].to_dict()
mean_pm25 = None if pd.isna(ind["mean_pm25"]) else float(ind["mean_pm25"])
max_pm25 = None if pd.isna(ind["max_pm25"]) else float(ind["max_pm25"])
mean_aqi = None if pd.isna(ind["mean_aqi"]) else float(ind["mean_aqi"])
exceedance_hours = 0 if pd.isna(ind["exceedance_hours"]) else int(ind["exceedance_hours"])
peak_pm25_hour_of_day = None if pd.isna(ind["peak_pm25_hour_of_day"]) else int(ind["peak_pm25_hour_of_day"])

final_vals = {
    "mean_pm25": mean_pm25,
    "max_pm25": max_pm25,
    "mean_aqi": mean_aqi,
    "exceedance_hours": exceedance_hours,
    "peak_pm25_hour_of_day": peak_pm25_hour_of_day
}

hourly_summary_df = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT MIN(pm2_5)::float AS pm25_min,
       MAX(pm2_5)::float AS pm25_max,
       MIN(aqi)::float AS aqi_min,
       MAX(aqi)::float AS aqi_max,
       AVG(CASE WHEN pm2_5 > 75 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)::float AS pm25_exceedance_share
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = :station_id
  AND timestamp >= CAST(:start_ts AS timestamp)
  AND timestamp <  CAST(:end_ts AS timestamp)
"""), engine, params={"station_id": station_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})

transport_df = pd.read_sql(text("""
WITH st AS (
    SELECT coordinate
    FROM air_quality_station
    WHERE id = :station_id
),
steel AS (
    SELECT pc.id, pc.coordinate,
           ST_Distance(pc.coordinate, (SELECT coordinate FROM st)) AS dist_m,
           degrees(ST_Azimuth((SELECT coordinate FROM st)::geometry, pc.coordinate::geometry)) AS bearing_station_to_company_deg
    FROM polluting_company pc
    WHERE pc.city_id = 4
      AND pc.industry_type = 'STEEL'
      AND pc.coordinate IS NOT NULL
),
steel_space AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS steel_company_count,
           MIN(dist_m/1000.0)::float AS min_distance_km,
           AVG(dist_m/1000.0)::float AS mean_distance_km,
           MAX(dist_m/1000.0)::float AS max_distance_km
    FROM steel
),
wind AS (
    SELECT timestamp,
           AVG(wind_speed)::float AS wind_speed,
           degrees(atan2(AVG(sin(radians(wind_degree))), AVG(cos(radians(wind_degree))))) AS wd_raw
    FROM hourly_grid_wind
    WHERE timestamp >= CAST(:start_ts AS timestamp)
      AND timestamp <  CAST(:end_ts AS timestamp)
      AND ST_DWithin(coordinate, (SELECT coordinate FROM st), 10000)
      AND wind_degree IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY timestamp
),
wind2 AS (
    SELECT timestamp, wind_speed,
           CASE WHEN wd_raw < 0 THEN wd_raw + 360 ELSE wd_raw END AS wind_from_deg
    FROM wind
),
em AS (
    SELECT e.company_id, e.timestamp,
           COALESCE(e.pm,0)::float AS pm_kg,
           COALESCE(e.nox,0)::float AS nox_kg,
           COALESCE(e.so2,0)::float AS so2_kg,
           COALESCE(e.co,0)::float AS co_kg
    FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission e
    JOIN steel s ON s.id = e.company_id
    WHERE e.timestamp >= CAST(:start_ts AS timestamp)
      AND e.timestamp <  CAST(:end_ts AS timestamp)
),
total_em AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT company_id)::int AS companies_with_emission,
           COUNT(*)::int AS emission_records,
           SUM(pm_kg)::float AS total_pm_kg,
           SUM(nox_kg)::float AS total_nox_kg,
           SUM(so2_kg)::float AS total_so2_kg,
           SUM(co_kg)::float AS total_co_kg
    FROM em
),
aligned AS (
    SELECT e.*,
           LEAST(ABS(w.wind_from_deg - s.bearing_station_to_company_deg),
                 360 - ABS(w.wind_from_deg - s.bearing_station_to_company_deg)) AS angular_diff_deg,
           w.wind_speed
    FROM em e
    JOIN steel s ON s.id = e.company_id
    JOIN wind2 w ON w.timestamp = e.timestamp
),
align_agg AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS wind_emission_matched_records,
           AVG(wind_speed)::float AS mean_wind_speed_ms,
           AVG(CASE WHEN angular_diff_deg <= 45 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)::float AS source_to_station_wind_match_share,
           SUM(CASE WHEN angular_diff_deg <= 45 THEN pm_kg ELSE 0 END)::float AS wind_aligned_pm_kg,
           SUM(CASE WHEN angular_diff_deg <= 45 THEN nox_kg ELSE 0 END)::float AS wind_aligned_nox_kg,
           SUM(CASE WHEN angular_diff_deg <= 45 THEN so2_kg ELSE 0 END)::float AS wind_aligned_so2_kg,
           SUM(CASE WHEN angular_diff_deg <= 45 THEN co_kg ELSE 0 END)::float AS wind_aligned_co_kg
    FROM aligned
),
wind_hours AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS wind_hours,
           AVG(wind_speed)::float AS all_mean_wind_speed_ms
    FROM wind2
)
SELECT ss.*, te.companies_with_emission, te.emission_records,
       te.total_pm_kg, te.total_nox_kg, te.total_so2_kg, te.total_co_kg,
       wh.wind_hours, wh.all_mean_wind_speed_ms,
       aa.wind_emission_matched_records, aa.mean_wind_speed_ms,
       aa.source_to_station_wind_match_share,
       aa.wind_aligned_pm_kg, aa.wind_aligned_nox_kg, aa.wind_aligned_so2_kg, aa.wind_aligned_co_kg
FROM steel_space ss
CROSS JOIN total_em te
CROSS JOIN wind_hours wh
CROSS JOIN align_agg aa
"""), engine, params={"station_id": station_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})

print("站点核验:", meta_df.to_dict("records")[0] if len(meta_df) else "未找到站点")
print("时段记录核验:", count_df.to_dict("records")[0] if len(count_df) else "无记录")
for k, v in final_vals.items():
    print(f"VERIFY {k}: stored={old_vals[k]} | independent={v} | final={v}")
print("FINAL mean_pm25 =", mean_pm25)
print("FINAL max_pm25 =", max_pm25)
print("FINAL mean_aqi =", mean_aqi)
print("FINAL exceedance_hours =", exceedance_hours)
print("FINAL peak_pm25_hour_of_day =", peak_pm25_hour_of_day)
print("站点小时污染摘要:", hourly_summary_df.to_dict("records")[0] if len(hourly_summary_df) else "无记录")
print("邯郸钢铁企业集群输送聚合摘要:", transport_df.to_dict("records")[0] if len(transport_df) else "无可用聚合结果")
